hub.releaseNotes: macOS focus fix, auth state buffering.

freecell.releaseNotes: Modal standardization milestone. Every modal in the app now uses a single uniform Modal base class with consistent dismiss behavior across all platforms: ESC, backdrop click, vertical swipe, and Android back button all close any modal. Tabbed modals (trophy, settings, win dialog) get horizontal swipe between tabs and Left/Right arrow-key navigation. The win dialog gets a new × close button and minimizes to a pill that persists until you start a new game. Added a Danger Zone in Settings → Account that lets you delete your account and all associated data with password confirmation. New /privacy page at msogames.com/privacy. Closes feedback #350.
